scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:pilot: docker compose up -d postgres && npm run pilot:setup && npm run dev:all
scripts.pilot:setup: docker compose up -d postgres && cd backend && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts/pilot_setup.py
scripts.migrate:pg: docker compose run --rm -v ./backend/app.db:/app/app.db:ro -e DATABASE_URL=postgresql://sihia:sihia@postgres:5432/sihia backend python scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_postgres.py
